text: The aim of this paper is to represent Imam Al-Ghazali’s thoughts concerning the education in the present time. In Islamic scholarship, Al-Ghazali is regarded as a prolific scholar who has given considerable thought to issues of the nature of knowledge and of the method of acquisition and presentation of that knowledge. In his views concerning the education, Al-Ghazali regarded education not only as a tool for learning knowledge but also an institution for inculcating values in society, and so for bringing up human beings as complete persons. The research depends on the library research approach as it studies the manner in which Al-Ghazali explained the values of moral education. Then, it determines whether these values were appropriate or not. In addition, the study finds out whether the school of thought of Al-Ghazali is pertinent to the educational issues in this time period and finally it tries to show the advantageous effects which the schools of thought of this Islamic scholar have brought on modern education.
